title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!
